trending_videos.title: Moana | "Official Trailer" | In Theaters July 10
trending_videos.description:
The ocean chose her for a reason. 🌊
Experience Disney's #Moana, only in theaters July 10.

In “Moana,” Disney’s live action reimagining of the beloved Oscar®-nominated animated adventure, Moana (Catherine Lagaʻaia) answers the Ocean’s call and, for the first time, voyages beyond the reef of her island of Motunui with the infamous demigod Maui (Dwayne Johnson) on an unforgettable journey to restore prosperity to her people. The film is directed by Emmy® and Tony Award® winner Thomas Kail (“Hamilton”); produced by Dwayne Johnson, Dany Garcia, Beau Flynn, Hiram Garcia and Lin-Manuel Miranda; and executive produced by Kail, Scott Sheldon, Charles Newirth and Auliʻi Cravalho, who voiced Moana in the animated films “Moana” and “Moana 2.” “Moana” features original songs by Lin-Manuel Miranda, Opetaia Foaʻi and Mark Mancina, and an original score composed by Mancina. Audiences can experience the brilliant cinematic sights, sounds and songs of “Moana” exclusively in theaters on July 10, 2026.

trending_videos.title: Second Round: Iowa vs. Florida
trending_videos.description: Iowa faces Florida in the South Region second round at Benchmark International Arena. After a hard-fought battle with the Tigers, Iowa meets the Gators. Florida beat Prairie View 114-55 to qualify. Both teams aim for the tournament's next round.

trending_videos.title: Dutton Ranch | Official Teaser | Paramount+
trending_videos.description:
Rip Wheeler and Beth Dutton gamble everything on a new life in South Texas, but the promise of building a future far from the ghosts of Yellowstone quickly collides with brutal new realities and a rival ranch that will stop at nothing to protect its empire.

Dutton Ranch. Streaming May 15. Only on Paramount+.

trending_videos.title: Second Round: UCLA vs. UConn
trending_videos.description: The East Region round two gets underway as UCLA takes on UConn at Xfinity Mobile Arena. The Bruins beat the Knights 75-71 to qualify, while the Huskies beat Furman 82-71. Both teams look to qualify for the next round in this high-stakes matchup.

trending_videos.title: JUJUTSU KAISEN Sendai Colony | Official Trailer | Crunchyroll
trending_videos.description:
Watch JUJUTSU KAISEN on Crunchyroll! http://got.cr/cc-jjkpv

ABOUT JUJUTSU KAISEN
Yuji Itadori is a boy with tremendous physical strength, though he lives a completely ordinary high school life. One day, to save a classmate who has been attacked by curses, he eats the finger of Ryomen Sukuna, taking the curse into his own soul. From then on, he shares one body with Ryomen Sukuna. Guided by the most powerful of sorcerers, Satoru Gojo, Itadori is admitted to Tokyo Jujutsu High School, an organization that fights the curses... and thus begins the heroic tale of a boy who became a curse to exorcise a curse, a life from which he could never turn back.

ABOUT CRUNCHYROLL
Crunchyroll is the place to watch all your favorite anime! Stream new anime, full episodes, movies, OVAs, music, openings, endings, trailers and all the best moments in anime, subbed and dubbed!

trending_videos.description: The Regional 1 second round begins as the Fighting Irish face the Buckeyes at Value City Arena. This matchup features junior Hannah Hidalgo and sophomore Jaloni Cambridge. Both sides look to bring their best and advance to the next tournament round.

sports.description: Sports content is prominently featured, with three out of ten videos focusing on college sports matchups.
sports.insight: There is a strong interest in sports events, particularly college sports, which indicates an opportunity for content creators and brands to tap into this niche by offering more in-depth analysis, highlights, and behind-the-scenes content.

entertainment.description: Trailers for movies and series are popular, with four videos being trailers or teasers (Moana, Dutton Ranch, JUJUTSU KAISEN, Bite By Night).
entertainment.insight: The high viewership of trailers suggests a robust demand for entertainment content. Channels focusing on reviews, reactions, and predictions about upcoming releases could see increased engagement.

music.description: Music is a recurring theme, with two music-related videos (Fox BD's music video and Pitbull's lyric video).
music.insight: Music videos and lyric videos continue to capture audience attention. There is potential for creators to explore collaborations with emerging artists or create derivative content like dance challenges or remixes.

diverse_sources.description: Content is produced by a variety of channels, indicating a diverse content ecosystem.
diverse_sources.insight: Channels from different niches (e.g., Disney, Paramount Plus, Crunchyroll) are represented, suggesting that there is an opportunity for cross-promotion and collaborations between creators across different genres.

branding_opportunities.description: Top channels are established brands with a single video each on the trending list.
branding_opportunities.insight: Emerging creators can learn from the branding strategies of these big names. Focusing on consistent branding and quality content can help smaller channels gain traction.

sports_coverage.description: Given the popularity of sports videos, there's a market for supplementary content.
sports_coverage.insight: Channels can expand into pre-game analysis, post-game breakdowns, and fan interaction segments to capture a dedicated audience.

entertainment_analysis.description: With multiple trailers trending, there's a demand for detailed entertainment analysis.
entertainment_analysis.insight: There is potential for channels to provide in-depth reviews, Easter egg hunts, and theory videos surrounding popular trailers and series.

music_engagement.description: Music content remains a staple in trending videos.
music_engagement.insight: There is a market for engagement-driven content like interactive music challenges, live sessions, and behind-the-scenes looks at music video production.

analysis.note: Transcript analysis is more detailed, metadata analysis provides broader trends
